task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map view to the Strait of Gibraltar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view should show the Strait of Gibraltar, displaying the southern tip of Spain and the northern tip of Morocco.

task_completion.description: Agent activates the Ruler or Measurement tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Ruler' window or a measurement interface (e.g., 'Measure distance and area') should be visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent draws a line connecting Punta de Tarifa to the Moroccan coast.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A yellow (or otherwise colored) measurement line should be visible on the map. One end must be at the southernmost tip of Spain (Punta de Tarifa) and the other on the nearest point of the Moroccan coast (near Point Cires).

task_completion.description: The measured distance is within the expected range (13.0 km - 17.0 km).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ruler or Measurement window should display a distance value (Length) between 13.0 kilometers and 17.0 kilometers (or equivalent in other units if converted).

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct name in the save dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Path', 'New Line', or properties dialog should be visible where the Name field is filled with 'Gibraltar_Crossing_Measurement'.

task_completion.description: The measurement is saved in the 'My Places' sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar (usually on the left) should list an item named 'Gibraltar_Crossing_Measurement' under the 'My Places' section.

integrity.description: Agent uses the application GUI to measure and save.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show mouse cursors, open dialog boxes, or tool activation within the Google Earth interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The measurement is performed manually on the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: The line should be visually drawn on the map canvas, confirming the agent interacted with the map rather than just entering coordinates into a form without visual confirmation.

integrity.description: Agent performs the measurement rather than looking up the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be viewing the map and using the ruler tool, not browsing a search engine or Wikipedia to find the distance textually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The narrowest width of the Strait of Gibraltar is approximately 13.0 km. The distance from Punta de Tarifa (Spain) to Point Cires (Morocco) is approximately 16.5 km. The measurement displayed in the tool should be between 13.0 km and 17.0 km. The European endpoint is Punta de Tarifa (approx 36.0025° N). The African endpoint is Point Cires (approx 35.9103° N).
